description: SEO extraction registry for MadCore toolbox phase 1

helpers.name: generateWebsiteFiles
helpers.purpose: Generate website page files, sitemap, and robots from a generator config.
helpers.notes: Core candidate, but current implementation hardcodes madkontrollen.dk subdomain URL shape. Phase 1 extracted tenant-neutral equivalent in tools/seo/generator/core.js.

helpers.name: generatePages
helpers.purpose: Build index page and configured landing pages.
helpers.notes: Private helper in current file. Needs contract mapping to SEO page schema before runtime migration.

helpers.name: generateSitemap
helpers.purpose: Generate sitemap XML for generated pages.
helpers.notes: Phase 3 shared helper. Pure ESM. No Firebase dependency. Existing app runtime still has old local copies until import migration.

helpers.name: generateRobots
helpers.purpose: Generate robots.txt pointing to sitemap.
helpers.notes: Phase 3 shared helper. Pure ESM. No Firebase dependency. Existing app runtime still has old local copies until import migration.

helpers.name: runGenerator
helpers.purpose: Browser runner around generator-core; logs generated files and calls saveFiles stub.
helpers.notes: Runner is UI/dev oriented. Keep as app wrapper until publisher adapters are wired.

helpers.name: loadHeroAwningInline
helpers.purpose: Load awning SVG into preview hero DOM.
helpers.notes: Browser/UI helper. Should become theme asset adapter, not SEO core.

helpers.name: getGeneratorConfig
helpers.purpose: Collect current form/UI state into SEO generator config.
helpers.notes: UI-bound and restaurant-specific. Extract later into UI adapter plus tenant contract mapper.

helpers.name: buildLandingPageObjects
helpers.purpose: Create multiple SEO landing page objects from business/category/city/keyword seeds.
helpers.notes: Contains restaurant-specific copy. Move later as industry prompt/template pack.

helpers.name: generateSite
helpers.purpose: Render generator preview, update CTA/contact/SEO page cards, optionally persist config.
helpers.notes: UI orchestration. Must stay out of tools/seo/core.

helpers.name: persistConfig
helpers.purpose: Save SEO generator config through Firebase callable.
helpers.notes: Firebase/browser adapter.

helpers.name: buildSeoLandingPages
helpers.purpose: Backend SEO page seed generator used before writing seo_pages.
helpers.notes: Generic shape, but restaurant/Madkontrollen copy and URL assumptions remain. Extract after contract tests.

helpers.name: upsertWebsiteAndSeoPages
helpers.purpose: Write website and generated SEO pages to Firestore.
helpers.notes: Firestore adapter, not core.

helpers.name: persistSeoGeneratorConfig
helpers.purpose: Callable function that stores sanitized SEO generator configs in seo_generator_configs.
helpers.notes: Firestore adapter and auth boundary.

helpers.name: seoSiteRenderer
helpers.purpose: HTTP renderer for published SEO subdomain pages from Firestore.
helpers.notes: Publisher/rendering adapter. Current domain matching is Madkontrollen-specific.

helpers.name: searchRestaurantImages
helpers.purpose: Search Pexels for restaurant hero images.
helpers.notes: Asset sourcing adapter with restaurant-specific naming.

helpers.name: enhanceAndUploadRestaurantImage
helpers.purpose: Upload/enhance hero image through Cloudinary and update SEO hero image docs.
helpers.notes: Asset adapter; not core.

helpers.name: generateSeoAiSuggestions
helpers.purpose: Generate Danish local restaurant SEO suggestions from input and optional website content.
helpers.notes: Prompt/AI adapter. Needs industry-neutral prompt contract before moving.

helpers.name: renderTemplate
helpers.purpose: Replace template placeholders and render static landing pages.
helpers.notes: Static publisher candidate; current script writes directly to public.

helpers.name: publishLandingSite
helpers.purpose: Publish website and SEO pages to Firestore from a config file.
helpers.notes: Firestore publisher adapter.

helpers.name: saveDraftSeoPage
helpers.purpose: Save a draft SEO page to the seo_pages collection using injected Firestore-like db.
helpers.notes: Phase 5 Firestore draft adapter. Pure ESM. No Firebase import or initializeApp. Does not alter runtime imports.

helpers.name: updateDraftSeoPage
helpers.purpose: Patch a draft SEO page in seo_pages using merge semantics and injected db.
helpers.notes: Phase 5 Firestore draft adapter. Pure ESM. No Firebase import or initializeApp. Does not alter runtime imports.

helpers.name: getDraftSeoPage
helpers.purpose: Fetch a draft SEO page from seo_pages by pageId using injected db.
helpers.notes: Phase 5 Firestore draft adapter. Pure ESM. No Firebase import or initializeApp. Does not alter runtime imports.

helpers.name: saveGeneratorConfig
helpers.purpose: Save tenant SEO generator config to seo_generator_configs using injected db.
helpers.notes: Phase 5 Firestore draft adapter. Pure ESM. No Firebase import or initializeApp. Does not alter runtime imports.

helpers.name: mapSaveSeoGeneratorConfigPayload
helpers.purpose: Map existing saveSeoGeneratorConfig callable payload shape to shared tenant SEO generator config contract.
helpers.notes: Phase 6 mapper. Pure ESM. Requires explicit domain or baseDomain option; no app domain hardcoding.

helpers.name: saveSeoGeneratorConfigDraft
helpers.purpose: Save an existing saveSeoGeneratorConfig payload through the shared Firestore draft publisher adapter.
helpers.notes: Phase 6 wrapper. Pure ESM. No Firebase import or initializeApp. Does not alter runtime imports.
